entity.label: Ebez
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Tin, or white, a town in the tribe of Issachar (Josh. 19:20), at the north of the plain of Esdraelon. It is probably identified with the ruins of el-Beida.

nodes.label: Ebez
nodes.description: Tin, or white, a town in the tribe of Issachar (Josh. 19:20), at the north of the plain of Esdraelon. It is probably identified with the ruins of el-Beida.

verses.text: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,
